text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The protocols.io page at the cited URL does exist and contains a real protocol titled "Lightweight Brain Tumor Segmentation on Low-Resource Systems: A Step-by-Step Guide with 3D U-Net," but its actual authors are Ayomide Oladele, Raymond Confidence, Dong Zhang, Charity Umoren, Anu Gbadamosi, Farouk Dako, Maruf Adewole, and Udunna Anazodo — not "Fatima Adebayo." The cited author name does not match any of the real authors of this protocol, making this a grafted (fabricated-author) reference.
LINK: https://www.protocols.io/view/lightweight-brain-tumor-segmentation-on-low-resour-gz4sbx8wf.html
